rule: Use original BM25 top1 chunk text verbatim (with metadata markers). No selection.
Use oracle evidence span (gold evidence from dataset).
Split each of top3 BM25 chunks into sentences. Pick sentence with max F1-like token overlap with claim.
Split each of top5 BM25 chunks into sentences. Pick sentence with max F1-like token overlap with claim.
Split each of top10 BM25 chunks into sentences. Pick sentence with max F1-like token overlap with claim.
Score = sentence-claim overlap + 0.2 * parent_chunk_bm25_score. Pick max.
Compute NLI(evidence=sentence, hypothesis=claim) for all top5 sentences. Pick max entailment_prob.
Pick sentence with min NLI entropy (most confident).
Pick sentence with max abs(entailment - contradiction).
Pick best sentence by overlap from top5. Add 1 most-overlapping neighbor (same chunk adjacent OR another chunk sentence).
Filter top5 sentences to 10-40 words only. Pick max overlap.
